name: jet-erp
description: Jet Container ERP - Corrugated estimating & Kiwiplan integration

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n web,api,shared -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:shared"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.deploy: npm run build:shared && npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:web
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build:web && npm run deploy -w apps/web
